title: rubus schleicheri var. flavipes
intro: Rubus schleicheri var. flavipes, also known as the yellow-fruited dewberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus schleicheri var. flavipes include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal uses, with the berries being particularly valued for their flavor and nutritional value.
